title: Literature Evidence Evaluation To Reproducible Report
goal: Evaluate a biomedical or SciForge automation claim across multiple turns, preserve explicit references, and deliver a Markdown report plus CSV evidence matrix.

rounds.prompt: 评估 claim：Playwright MCP 是否适合 SciForge 浏览器自动化技能安装与安全验证。先给出检索计划、证据类型和可复现产物计划。
acceptanceChecks: backend gives a plan instead of a canned answer

rounds.prompt: 执行检索并生成 paper list、证据矩阵和初版结论；请同时保存 CSV/Markdown refs。
acceptanceChecks: paper list and evidence matrix appear in results
object references include report and CSV

rounds.prompt: ※1 这个限制会不会推翻初版结论？请只围绕被引用的限制回答。

referenceOps.source: one limitation sentence in the evidence summary

acceptanceChecks: answer explicitly discusses the selected limitation

rounds.prompt: ※2 请重排证据等级，标出低可信证据，并说明变化原因。
acceptanceChecks: answer uses rows from the selected matrix

rounds.prompt: ※3 解释这个失败或警告 ExecutionUnit 对报告可信度有什么影响，并给出修复或降级策略。
acceptanceChecks: failure log is treated as evidence
report confidence changes or blocker is recorded

rounds.prompt: 输出最终 Markdown 报告、CSV 证据表和 object references；报告必须包含引用如何改变结论、limitations 和复现步骤。

browser: screenshot after final object chip focuses report
computerUse: click reference chip and verify highlight

blockerTemplate: Record unavailable backend/model/port/quota, the last visible UI state, and exact rerun command.
